label: cache proof • reuse keeps compounding across a three-turn session
query: Here is a fact to remember: the warehouse door code is 7-7-2-4. Acknowledge briefly.
notes: Growth row: turns 2 and 3 each extend the same conversation, so the reuse counter must move at least twice — proving the cache keeps matching as the prefix GROWS, not just once after turn 1 (a one-shot warm-up bug would pass the 2-turn case and fail here). Same topology mapping as the 2-turn row: KV floor on full attention, companion floor on hybrid-SSM. Off-CI (needs a local model).
